channel.title: Posts on Mirza Pandzo
channel.description: Recent content in Posts on Mirza Pandzo

item.title: What is JAMStack and why use it?
item.description: I am a big proponent of JAMStack. With JAMStack, small teams can build interactive, performant, scalable and secure websites at low operating cost. What is JAMStack? JAMstack stands for JavaScript, APIs, and Markup. The term was coined by Mathias Biilmann to describe “a modern web development architecture based on client-side JavaScript, reusable APIs, and prebuilt Markup”. Where can static sites be hosted? The stack name itself was coined by the founders of netlify.
